entity.label: Zior
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Littleness, a city in the mountains of Judah (Josh. 15:54); the modern Si’air, 4 1/2 miles north-north-east of Hebron.

nodes.label: Zior
nodes.description: Littleness, a city in the mountains of Judah (Josh. 15:54); the modern Si’air, 4 1/2 miles north-north-east of Hebron.

verses.text: And Humtah, and Kirjatharba, which is Hebron, and Zior; nine cities with their villages:
